deviations.description: The process model contains the activity 'Ask Patient About Pain Level' (sid-8F9C9B6C-D4C5-4E10-992D-30B563AD662E) performed every 20 minutes for patients with high anesthesia tolerance, as required by Version 1. Version 2 replaces this obligation with 'Administer Additional Anesthesia' every 20 minutes, but the process model does not include any activity for administering additional anesthesia at this interval. Therefore, the process fails to meet the new, stricter requirement.
process_model_reference: Ask Patient About Pain Level, (absence of) Administer Additional Anesthesia

deviations.description: The change from 'periodicity_minutes' to 'interval_minutes' in the temporal constraint does not affect compliance because the process model lacks any implementation of the new required activity ('Administer Additional Anesthesia') at any interval.
